name: evalgate
description: Eval-gated todos for agentic coding. Your agents can't tick the checkbox until the verifier passes.

scripts.release:patch: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm version patch && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm version minor && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm version major && git push origin main --follow-tags

author: Jorge Jacome
